intake.raw_input: 提前还贷还是继续投资更合适

task_spec.goal: 提前还贷还是继续投资更合适

hard: do not auto-execute any high-risk investment recommendation
soft: prefer conclusions with explicit confidence and risk explanation

success_criteria.description: compare debt paydown and investment continuation using deterministic metrics
include liquidity impact and risk explanation

required_evidence.reason: debt obligations and minimum payment pressure

task_spec.goal: 提前还贷还是继续投资更合适

hard: do not auto-execute any high-risk investment recommendation
soft: prefer conclusions with explicit confidence and risk explanation

success_criteria.description: compare debt paydown and investment continuation using deterministic metrics
include liquidity impact and risk explanation

required_evidence.reason: debt obligations and minimum payment pressure

blocks.goal: 比较提前还贷与继续投资的债务压力、APR 暴露与最低还款影响。

success_criteria.description: debt tradeoff recommendation explicitly reflects APR, debt burden, and payment pressure

verification_hints.description: tradeoff conclusion must cite debt snapshot and relevant cashflow evidence

risk_hints.rationale: high APR or minimum payment pressure should bias the decision toward debt risk reduction
retrieved debt decision memory increased debt tradeoff priority

blocks.goal: 评估继续投资或提前还贷前的流动性缓冲、现金流净结余和消费波动。

success_criteria.description: liquidity and cashflow cushion are made explicit before any decision recommendation

verification_hints.description: cashflow/liquidity recommendation must be grounded in selected transaction or portfolio evidence

risk_hints.rationale: weak liquidity coverage can change whether debt paydown should be prioritized

steps.name: 收集债务与投资证据
steps.description: 拉取债务、现金流和持仓证据，形成决策基线。

steps.name: 计算对比指标
steps.description: 使用确定性指标比较提前还贷与继续投资的风险和现金流影响。

evidence.summary: normalized 7 transactions into monthly cashflow evidence

confidence.reason: derived from structured debt account records

evidence.summary: captured 2 debt accounts with 0.08 weighted APR

debt.summary: 债务块结论：债务负担率 0.03，最低还款压力 0.03。
key_findings: 债务负担率 0.03，最低还款压力 0.03，平均 APR 0.08。
当前整体风险 medium，月度净结余 644900 分。
历史记忆提示债务压力曾是主要风险源，本轮分析已提高债务风险权重。

metric_records.name: debt_payoff_pressure
metric_records.derivation: derived from debt burden, minimum payment pressure, and APR

metric_records.name: liquidity_after_paydown
metric_records.derivation: emergency fund months after allocating one month surplus to debt paydown

metric_records.name: cash_buffer_impact
metric_records.derivation: one-month surplus relative to monthly outflow

metric_records.name: effective_tradeoff_score
metric_records.derivation: investable surplus signal minus debt payoff pressure

risk_flags.detail: 当前债务压力可控，但仍需持续关注最低还款覆盖和流动性缓冲。

recommendations.title: 保持债务覆盖并比较投资机会成本
recommendations.detail: 当前债务压力可控，但仍需先确保现金流缓冲和最低还款覆盖。
caveats: 债务决策中的金额、压力指标和流动性指标均以 Finance Engine 的 deterministic metrics 为准。

recommendations.title: 在保留缓冲前提下评估继续投资
recommendations.detail: 当前存在可投资结余，但如果继续增加风险资产，需要先确认现金缓冲和债务压力是否允许。
caveats: 若紧急备用金不足或债务压力偏高，不应在未复核风险的情况下直接扩大投资敞口。
recommendations.approval_reason: 低流动性或高债务压力下的 invest_more 建议需要治理审批

caveats: 债务决策中的金额、压力指标和流动性指标均以 Finance Engine 的 deterministic metrics 为准。
debt.approval_reason: 低流动性或高债务压力下的 invest_more 建议需要治理审批

cashflow.summary: 本月现金流整体为正，且检索到历史支出记忆，因此本轮更强调持续性的订阅清理与夜间消费复盘。
key_findings: deterministic metrics 显示本月净结余为正，当前现金流没有失控。
经常性订阅和夜间消费信号说明仍有可优化的可变支出。

metric_records.derivation: copied from portfolio emergency fund coverage

metric_records.name: liquidity_buffer_months

metric_records.name: subscription_burden_ratio
metric_records.derivation: duplicate subscriptions relative to recurring subscription set

metric_records.name: recurring_expense_signal
metric_records.derivation: fixed expenses relative to monthly outflow

risk_flags.detail: 虽然当前结余为正，但历史记忆与本期 evidence 一起说明可变支出波动具有持续性。

recommendations.title: 继续清理低使用率订阅
recommendations.detail: 跨 session 记忆显示订阅优化曾被连续提及，因此本轮建议把订阅清理放到现金流优化的第一优先级。

caveats: 所有金额与比率以 deterministic metrics 为准。
